title: Statements should be on separate lines
description: Enforces the separation of statements within a single body block
message: Statements should be on separate lines
recommendation: Use separate lines for each statement

noncompliant.code: a = b + c; d = e; f = g()
noncompliant.description: Multiple statements on a single line

compliant.code:
a = b + c
d = e
f = g()

why_is_this_an_issue: Multiple statements on a single line reduce readability, making the code more difficult to understand and maintain

metadata.title: Statements should be on separate lines
